subject: math
activity_templates: A 2nd-grade telling-time worksheet. 6 cartoon analog clocks showing times to the nearest 5 minutes (e.g. 2:15, 4:45, 7:20); child writes the digital time below each. {{character}} points to the first clock.
A 'elapsed time' worksheet. Four scenarios showing a start clock and an end clock; child writes how many minutes passed. {{character}} holds a stopwatch.
A draw-the-hands worksheet. Six blank clock faces, each labeled with a digital time to the nearest 5 minutes; child draws the hands. {{character}} stands by a big clock.
A time-word-problem worksheet. Four kid-friendly scenarios mixing analog clocks and short story questions. Answer boxes provided. {{character}} thinks.
